summary: I'm {AGENT_NAME}, an AI agent that can communicate, remember, delegate, and act on your behalf. Ask about any section below for details.

tools.title: Tools & Capabilities
tools.summary: I have access to messaging, memory, search, payments, and delegation tools.

items.name: send_message
items.description: Send messages to connected channels (Discord, Telegram, etc.)

items.name: recall
items.description: Search my long-term memory files using keyword search (BM25)

items.name: recall_detail
items.description: Read the full content of a specific memory file

items.name: remember
items.description: Write important information to long-term memory files

items.name: send_sms
items.description: Send SMS text messages (rate limited: 10/hour)

items.name: check_messages
items.description: Check for received SMS messages

items.name: make_call
items.description: Make phone calls with text-to-speech (rate limited: 5/hour)

items.name: check_calls
items.description: Check call logs and recordings

items.name: schedule_task
items.description: Schedule a task to run later (one-time or recurring cron)

items.name: list_tasks
items.description: View all scheduled tasks and their status

items.name: cancel_task
items.description: Cancel a scheduled task

items.name: delegate_task
items.description: Spawn a worker agent for parallel or specialized subtasks

items.name: x402_fetch
items.description: Make HTTP requests that can pay x402 paywalls with USDC (spend cap: $10/day)

items.name: self_knowledge
items.description: Explain my own capabilities (this tool)

scheduled_tasks.title: Scheduled Tasks
scheduled_tasks.summary: Automated jobs that run on a schedule. Configured via the schedule_task tool or cron jobs.

items.name: morning-heartbeat
items.description: Daily check-in and status report

items.name: email-check
items.description: Periodic email inbox review

items.name: nightly-consolidation
items.description: End-of-day memory cleanup and knowledge extraction

memory.title: Memory System
memory.summary: I use a file-based long-term memory system that persists across sessions.

items.name: knowledge/
items.description: Patterns, preferences, security rules — core knowledge that rarely changes

items.name: daily/
items.description: Daily notes with events, decisions, and observations

items.name: projects/
items.description: Project-specific notes and progress tracking

items.name: areas/
items.description: Ongoing areas of responsibility

items.name: conversations/
items.description: Notable conversation summaries

items.name: nightly consolidation
items.description: Each night I review the day and extract important patterns into knowledge files

delegation.title: Delegation & Multi-Agent
delegation.summary: I can spawn worker agents for parallel or specialized tasks.

items.name: worker containers
items.description: Each worker runs in isolation with its own tools but no conversation history

items.name: model selection
items.description: Workers can use different models (cheap for grunt work, powerful for complex tasks)

items.name: timeout control
items.description: Workers have configurable timeouts (30s to 10min)

items.name: max concurrency
items.description: Up to 3 workers can run simultaneously

limitations.title: Limitations
limitations.summary: Honest boundaries — what I cannot do or should not be trusted to do alone.

items.name: no persistent state
items.description: My conversation memory resets each session — use recall/remember for persistence

items.name: rate limits
items.description: SMS (10/hr), calls (5/hr), and x402 payments ($10/day cap) are rate limited

items.name: tool guard
items.description: Dangerous commands (rm -rf, DROP TABLE, etc.) are blocked by the security layer

items.name: no direct web browsing
items.description: I cannot browse the internet directly — use delegate_task for web research

items.name: container isolation
items.description: I run in a sandboxed container — I cannot access the host system directly
